tags: [anunnaki, temata, themes, index, english]

# Témata (Themes)

This folder catalogs the major themes, technologies, and conceptual frameworks that Zecharia Sitchin identified in the [[Anunnaki]] narrative. These themes span genetics, warfare, timekeeping, navigation, and the sacred sciences.

## Core Themes

| Theme | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [[Genetické-inženýrství]] | The creation of humanity through DNA manipulation |
| [[Jaderné-zbraně]] | The nuclear weapons used by the Anunnaki |
| [[Kalendář]] | The timekeeping systems established by the Anunnaki |
| [[Kosmodromy]] | The spaceport facilities on Earth |
| [[Monoatomické-zlato]] | The special gold the Anunnaki sought |
| [[Navigační-majáky]] | The beacon system for spacecraft |
| [[Posvátná-čísla]] | Sacred numbers encoding astronomical knowledge |
| [[Precese]] | The precessional cycle of Earth's axis |
| [[Pyramidy]] | The pyramids as navigation beacons |
| [[Smíšená-manželství]] | Interbreeding between Anunnaki and humans |
| [[Vimány-a-letadla]] | Anunnaki flying vehicles and aircraft |

## Interconnections

These themes are deeply interconnected. For instance:

- [[Genetické-inženýrství]] → [[Smíšená-manželství]] (genetic manipulation and interbreeding)
- [[Kosmodromy]] → [[Navigační-majáky]] → [[Pyramidy]] (space technology infrastructure)
- [[Kalendář]] → [[Precese]] → [[Posvátná-čísla]] (time and mathematics)
- [[Jaderné-zbraně]] → [[Nukleární-zničení]] (warfare and destruction)
- [[Monoatomické-zlato]] → [[Těžba-zlata]] (the purpose of the Anunnaki mission)

---

*"The themes of the ancient texts are not separate — they form a single coherent narrative of science, technology, and history."*
